steps.t: Bandits tend to lurk in north-west Tâkhdar. Okhtâr Ghôlkhas, head of a prominent family, has asked you to retrieve heirloom armour a group of bandits …
Search for clues as to the armour's whereabouts
Rashâm can be found in the black market of Kheb Hanût. A letter from the Denjâri bandits' leader says she has sold the Ghôlkhas's stolen armour to a b…
Speak with Rashâm in Kheb Hanût.
